questions.question:
A relation R is defined on the set of integers as xRy iff (x + y) is even. Which of the following statements is true?

(GATE CSE 2000)
options:
B.

R is an equivalence relation having 1 equivalence class

C.

R is an equivalence relation having 2 equivalence classes

D.

R is an equivalence relation having 3 equivalence classes
questions.correct_answer:
C.

R is an equivalence relation having 2 equivalence classes
questions.explanation: Click here for detail solution by gateoverflow

questions.question:
Suppose that the expectation of a random variable X is 5. Which of the following statements is true?

(GATE CSE 1999)
options:
A.

There is a sample point at which X has the value 5.

B.

There is a sample point at which X has value greater than 5.

C.

There is a sample point at which X has a value greater than equal to 5.
questions.correct_answer:
C.

There is a sample point at which X has a value greater than equal to 5.
